message:
Add jfp save command for premium prompt bookmarking

Implements the save command to bookmark prompts to user's premium account:
- Validates prompt exists in local registry before API call
- Requires authentication (prompts for login if not logged in)
- Requires premium tier (shows upgrade message for free users)
- POST to /cli/saved-prompts endpoint
- Handles errors: 401 (session expired), 403 (requires premium),
  404 (not found), 409 (already saved), network errors
- Supports --json flag for scripting

Includes 8 unit tests covering all scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
